outfit_info.outfit_description: The outfit features a vibrant floral puffer jacket layered over a graphic cotton jersey T-shirt, paired with casual denim shorts and sporty sock sneakers. This look embodies youthful energy with bold colors and prints, balancing warmth and breathability for dynamic everyday wear.

model_attributes.body: Youthful, slim physique with natural posture and a joyful, confident facial expression.
model_attributes.pose: Mid-air jump with arms extended outward, legs slightly bent, expressing motion and carefree energy.
model_attributes.background: Surreal, colorful fantasy environment filled with large floating orbs and small fantastical creatures in chef hats.

outfit.P00748211: black sock sneakers with red and white soles
